arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim looking to avoid Erik ten Hag Man United mistake that sealed his fate
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has so far refused to change his philosophy at Old Trafford, something which Erik ten Hag chose not to do at M16.
